defs: Of or pertaining to Ren Antoine Ferchault de Raumur; conformed to the scale adopted by Raumur in graduating the thermometer he invented.
notes: ☞ The Raumur thermometer is so graduated that 0° marks the freezing point and 80° the boiling point of water. Frequently indicated by R. Cf. Centigrade, and Fahrenheit. See Illust. of Thermometer.
